mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `user` ( email, password, provider, provider_id, nickname, profile_image, birthday, gender, phone, status, postcode, address, detail_address, created_at ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{password}, #{provider}, #{providerId}, #{nickname}, #{profileImage}, #{birthday}, #{gender}, #{phone}, 'active', #{postcode}, #{address}, #{detailAddress}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `user` WHERE email = #{email} AND status IN ('active', 'admin')
SELECT id FROM `user` WHERE email = #{email} AND status IN ('active', 'admin')
SELECT * FROM `user` WHERE nickname = #{nickname} AND phone = #{phone} AND status IN ('active', 'admin') LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_terms (user_id, terms_id, agreed, agreed_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{termsId}, #{agreed}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT type, version, content, is_required AS isRequired FROM terms
SELECT id, name AS interestName, icon_name AS iconName FROM interests ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_interests ( user_id, interest_id, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{interestId}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT interest_id FROM user_interests WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY interest_id ASC
SELECT agreed FROM user_terms WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND terms_id = 4 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule SET status = 'closed' WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'recruiting'

UPDATE `user` SET status = 'suspended', email = #{tombstoneEmail}, provider_id = '', phone = NULL, postcode = NULL, address = NULL, detail_address = NULL WHERE id = #{userId} AND status IN ('active', 'admin')
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.schedule_id) FROM ( SELECT s.id AS schedule_id FROM schedule s WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.status = 'completed' AND s.deleted_at IS NULL
UNION
SELECT p.schedule_id FROM participation p JOIN schedule s ON s.id = p.schedule_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 'approved' AND s.status = 'completed' AND s.deleted_at IS NULL ) t
